content: I've been feeling really burnt out from performing internationally as an opera singer. I'm thinking of taking a break to focus on my gardening hobby.
That sounds like a great idea, Finley. Gardening can be very therapeutic. What made you decide to take a break now?
I've been on tour for the past 6 months and I'm exhausted. I also recently adopted a golden retriever named Willow from a shelter and I want to spend more time with her.
That's wonderful! Congratulations on the new addition to your family. How's Willow adjusting to your busy schedule?
She's adjusting well, but I feel guilty for leaving her with a dog walker for so long. I'm thinking of hiring a dog sitter to take care of her when I'm away.

That's a great idea. It's always better to have someone trusted to take care of your pet. Have you thought about what you'll do during your break? Will you focus solely on gardening or explore other hobbies?
I'd like to focus on gardening and maybe take up calligraphy again. I used to love it, but haven't had the time lately.
Calligraphy is a great hobby. It can be very meditative. Do you have a favorite type of plant or flower that you like to garden with?
I love gardening with orchids. They're so delicate and beautiful. I've been thinking of entering a gardening competition in Paris next year.
That sounds like a great goal! Paris is a beautiful city. Have you performed there before?
Yes, I've performed at the Palais Garnier several times. It's one of my favorite venues. I'm thinking of taking a cooking class in Thai cuisine while I'm on break.
Thai cuisine is delicious. What inspired you to take a cooking class in that specific cuisine?
I've always loved the flavors and spices of Thai food. I think it would be a great way to explore a new hobby and meet new people.
